description_long: This is a decorative outdoor bench featuring a combination of dark-stained wooden slats and ornate wrought iron framing. The backrest and armrests are adorned with elegant scrollwork, giving the bench a classic, vintage appearance. The seat consists of several evenly spaced wooden planks, providing comfortable support for multiple people. The iron frame curves gracefully at the sides and base, enhancing both stability and aesthetic appeal. The bench is designed to be both functional and visually appealing, suitable for placement in parks, gardens, or along urban sidewalks. Its robust construction suggests durability against outdoor elements.
description: A vintage-style outdoor bench with dark wooden slats and ornate wrought iron scrollwork, designed for both comfort and decorative appeal.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the decorative iron scrollwork on the backrest and the alignment of the wooden slats.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved iron armrest and the profile of the wooden seat slats.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full seat, backrest, and intricate ironwork details across the top and bottom.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the matching curved iron armrest and the depth of the seat.
attribute_leg_design: curved wrought iron supports with scrollwork
